opportunity_map.title: Create .aiignore to protect protocol implementation paths and consensus integration code
opportunity_map.evidence: .aiignore absent. Protocol paths verified: cardano-node/src/Cardano/Node/Protocol/ (Byron.hs, Cardano.hs, Alonzo.hs, Conway.hs, Shelley.hs, Dijkstra.hs, Checkpoints.hs, Types.hs). Handlers: Handlers/Shutdown.hs, Handlers/TopLevel.hs. Genesis configs: configuration/cardano/mainnet-*.json.
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: All paths verified in tree. Safety-first: protecting protocol and genesis config paths costs nothing.

opportunity_map.title: Create a substantive CLAUDE.md covering node integration architecture, nix build system, and security-critical protocol paths
opportunity_map.evidence: CLAUDE.md absent. 15 cabal packages. Integration point for ledger/consensus/networking. README.md has architecture mermaid diagram but no AI-facing context. Zero AI config files.
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: CLAUDE.md absence verified. trace-dispatcher references removed (does not exist in repo). Core value holds.

opportunity_map.title: Use AI to generate test cases for mainnet configuration validation, building on existing CI workflow
opportunity_map.evidence: configuration/cardano/ has 20 files including mainnet genesis. check-mainnet-config.yml CI workflow exists. Test/Cardano/Config/Mainnet.hs exists as extension point. badConfig.yaml/goodConfig.yaml pattern in test data.
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: Config paths, CI workflow, and test file all verified. Well-scoped task with existing infrastructure.

opportunity_map.title: Use AI to expand trace-dispatcher test coverage
opportunity_map.evidence: trace-dispatcher/ does not exist in repo tree.
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: Stage A: Fabricated evidence. trace-dispatcher/ does not exist in the repo tree.

opportunity_map.title: Generate Haddock documentation for undocumented modules
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: Stage A: Half-fabricated evidence. References non-existent trace-dispatcher.

opportunity_map.title: Use AI to generate comprehensive developer onboarding docs
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: Stage A: Vague scope. Ignores existing external wiki. Does not establish onboarding as actual bottleneck.

opportunity_map.title: Use AI to generate structured PR descriptions
opportunity_map.evidence: PR description variance not necessarily a quality problem.
opportunity_map.adversarial_reason: Stage A: Misdiagnosed problem. PR template exists; issue is process compliance, not content generation.

adoption_state.evidence: No .aiignore, no AI config files, no AI-attributed commits. No observable AI attribution found — this does not confirm absence of AI use.
CLAUDE.md does not exist. No AI config files of any kind in the repository.
No AI-attributed commits in config test files. Existing tests are human-authored.

criteria_results.criterion: Security-critical paths identifiable in file tree
criteria_results.evidence: Protocol/*.hs (8 files), Handlers/*.hs (2 files), configuration/cardano/mainnet-*.json all verified
Zero AI-attributed commits, zero AI config files. Proactive boundary-setting still valuable.

criteria_results.criterion: AI tool in use or planned
criteria_results.evidence: No AI tools in use. Repo complexity warrants CLAUDE.md preemptively for when AI tools are adopted.
20 files in configuration/cardano/ including mainnet genesis

risk_surface.evidence: Protocol implementation — consensus integration. 8 .hs files. No AI commits. Network-wide impact if broken.
Shutdown and TopLevel handlers — operational safety. No AI commits.
Mainnet genesis and config files. CI validates via check-mainnet-config.yml. No AI commits.
Tracing/observability — high churn area (14 changes in parent dir). Era-specific tracing tied to hard fork logic. No AI commits.

recommendations.title: Create .aiignore listing Protocol/ handlers, genesis configs, and era-specific tracing paths
recommendations.measurable_outcome: .aiignore exists at repo root listing ≥4 paths: cardano-node/src/Cardano/Node/Protocol/, cardano-node/src/Cardano/Node/Handlers/, configuration/cardano/mainnet-*, cardano-node/src/Cardano/Node/Tracing/Era/
recommendations.recommended_learning: Review with node team lead. Start with Protocol/ paths (highest blast radius). Use .gitignore syntax.
recommendations.adversarial_reason: Stage B: All paths verified. Measurable outcome binary. Type valid (Absent + Practiced).

recommendations.title: Write CLAUDE.md covering 15-package integration architecture, nix build commands, external dependency boundaries, and contribution standards
recommendations.measurable_outcome: CLAUDE.md exists at repo root with ≥200 words covering: (1) integration architecture, (2) package map, (3) nix + cabal build commands, (4) external dependency boundaries, (5) contribution standards, (6) security-critical paths
recommendations.recommended_learning: Use README.md mermaid diagram as architecture starting point. Reference CONTRIBUTING.md for workflow. Document what is IN this repo vs what comes from cardano-ledger, ouroboros-consensus, ouroboros-network. Tracing code lives in cardano-node/src/Cardano/Node/Tracing/ and cardano-tracer/.
recommendations.adversarial_reason: Stage B: CLAUDE.md absence verified. Measurable outcome binary. Type valid.

recommendations.title: Extend mainnet config validation tests in Test/Cardano/Config/Mainnet.hs using AI to generate permutation test cases
recommendations.measurable_outcome: cardano-node/test/Test/Cardano/Config/Mainnet.hs has ≥5 additional test cases covering: invalid genesis hash, missing required fields, type mismatches
recommendations.recommended_learning: Give Claude Mainnet.hs + mainnet-config.json + mainnet-config.yaml. Ask: 'What config permutations are not tested?' Reference badConfig.yaml/goodConfig.yaml pattern from Test/Cardano/Tracing/NewTracing/data/.
recommendations.adversarial_reason: Stage B: Test file and config files verified. Measurable outcome binary. Type valid.

quadrant.position: High potential, low activity — no AI adoption detected, strong infrastructure for it
